---
description: "Use when reading, writing, editing, or reviewing Dev Container files."
applyTo: ".devcontainer/**"
---

# Dev Containers

The `.devcontainer/` directory contains configuration files for Dev Containers. These are divided into three categories:
1. `.devcontainer/.dev/`: Main development container of DevFeats, used for local development and CI tasks.
2. `.devcontainer/try-*/`: User-focused demo containers that showcase DevFeats features.
2. `.devcontainer/test-*/`: Developer-focused test containers used for live testing of features during development.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Other than `.devcontainer/.dev/`, all other files in this directory are autogenerated; **never edit them directly**.
